TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_kikul_a_yawkuay, title = kikul_a_yawkuay, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/kikul_a_yawkuay} }

S.FORM: izaw ku siwaay a kikul a yawkuay nu nikulitan, u Naluto bananas kya nikulitan. mahamin siwaay ku heni. u cay kalecad kya kikul atu caay kalecad a licelang ku heni. kakawaw nu kikul a yawkuay u kikul a yawkuay nu nikulitan ni Kisimoto Masasi(nipun a kamu: Ś≤łśú¨ śĖČŚŹ≤ÔľŹ„Āć„Āó„āā„Ā® „Āĺ„Āē„ĀóKishimoto Masashi) (1974ŚĻī11śúą8śó•Ôľć) pacunus ci nida tunu yawkuay nu lalangawan i kina patatakan. patetek cacay a kikul Icipi Siwkaku (Lihun a kamu: „ĀĄ„Ā°„Ā≥ „Āó„āÖ„Āč„ĀŹ) nuniyazu: limeken a likelikenan masimaw a ninticu: cay katineneg. matineneg: sibali uzip: izaw ku cacay a tabakiay a kikul nida, u kalakalawlaway kya uzip nida, izaw ku lu'timay a kulit muliyut i uzip nida. patapuc a icelang: wu-ay-low (Hulam a kamu: śąĎśĄõÁĺÖ, Lihun a kamu: „ā¨„āĘ„É©,Gaara), namakayca nida i bali a kanatal, sakalima a tumuk nu bali a kanatal; masawacu nida i niyazuay. sakasepat a tumuk nu bali a niyazu', u ama ni Wu-ay-low, caay kanamuh tu sasabaay a wawa nida. tusa a kikul Nipi Matatapi (Lihun a kamu: „Āę„Ā≥ „Āĺ„Āü„Āü„Ā≥) nuniyazu' : kudeman masimaw a ninticu : cay katineng matineneg: palamal uzip: tusa a kikul, sumilaway a lamal mukiluy tu zip nida, tabakiay a tangila, u takulaway a kulit nu kawanan a mata, u sumilaway a kulit nu kawiliay a mata. mahida salusalus ku ngipen, mahida sumilaway a likat maduduh tu uzip nida. kina patetek namakay kungku nu lalangawan nu lipun; u tusaay a kikul a yawkuay. u kungku ni lipun hananay, anu maka lasubu a mihcan ku nani' malayawkuay tu, siatusa tu kikul . patapuc a icelang: tatusa a Yutumu. tulu a kikul Sanpi Isobu (Lihun a kamu:„Āē„āď„Ā≥ „ĀĄ„ĀĚ„Ā∂ ) nuniyazu: masimaw a ninticu: matineneg: uzip: patapuc a icelang: sepat a kikul Yonpi Sankoku (Lihun a kamu: „āą„āď„Ā≥ „ĀĚ„āď„ĀĒ„ĀŹ„ĀÜ) nuniyazu: masimaw a ninticu: matineneg: uzip: patapuc a icelang: lima a kikul Gopi Kokuou (Lihun a kamu: „ĀĒ„Ā≥ „Āď„ĀŹ„Āä„ĀÜ) nuniyazu: masimaw a ninticu: matineneg: uzip: patapuc a icelang: enem a kikul Lokupi Sayken(Lihun a kamu: „āć„ĀŹ„Ā≥ „Āē„ĀĄ„ĀĎ„āď) nuniyazu: masimaw a ninticu: matineneg: uzip: patapuc a icelang: pitu a kikul Nanapi Jomei(Lihun a kamu: „Ā™„Ā™„Ā≥ „Ā°„āá„ĀÜ„āĀ„ĀĄ ) nuniyazu: masimaw a ninticu: matineneg: uzip: patapuc a icelang: walu a kikul Hacipi Kiuki(Lihun a kamu: „ĀĮ„Ā°„Ā≥ „Āé„āÖ„ĀÜ„Āć ) nuniyazu: masimaw a ninticu: matineneg: uzip: patapuc a icelang: siwa a kikul Giwpi Kulama(Lihun a kamu: „Āć„āÖ„ĀÜ„Ā≥ „āĮ„É©„Éě ) nuniyazu: masimaw a ninticu: matineneg: uzip: patapuc a icelang: cacay a bataan a kikul nuniyazu: masimaw a ninticu: matineneg: uzip: patapuc a icelang: malalitin tu ihekaay atu zumaay a natinengan weykipayke-ÁĀęŚĹĪŚŅćŤÄÖ weykipayke- ,ISBN 978-4-08-874247-2,2008ŚĻī9śúą9śó• " ,ISBN 978-986-382-631-6,2015ŚĻī2śúą10śó• "ÁĀęŚĹĪŚŅćŤÄÖ"śľęÁĒĽŚíĆŚä®ÁĒĽ
S.PHON: izaw ku siwaaj a kikur~…ĺ a jawkuaj nu nikur~…ĺitan, u nar~…ĺuto bananas kja nikur~…ĺitan. mańßamin siwaaj ku ńß…ôni. u ¶aj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad kja kikur~…ĺ atu ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a r~…ĺi ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ku ńß…ôni. kakawaw nu kikur~…ĺ a jawkuaj u kikur~…ĺ a jawkuaj nu nikur~…ĺitan ni kisimoto masasi(nipun a kamu: ** ******* ***kisńßimoto masasńßi) (***********) pa ¶unus ¶i nida tunu jawkuaj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan i kina patatakan. pat…ôt…ôk ¶a ¶aj a kikur~…ĺ i ¶ipi siwkaku (r~…ĺińßun a kamu: *** ****) nunijazu: r~…ĺim…ôk…ôn a r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺik…ônan masimaw a ninti ¶u: ¶aj katin…ôn…ôg. matin…ôn…ôg: sibar~…ĺi uzip: izaw ku ¶a ¶aj a tabakiaj a kikur~…ĺ nida, u kar~…ĺakar~…ĺawr~…ĺawaj kja uzip nida, izaw ku r~…ĺu Ē~ °timaj a kur~…ĺit mur~…ĺijut i uzip nida. patapu ¶ a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč: wu-aj-r~…ĺow (ńßur~…ĺam a kamu: ***, r~…ĺińßun a kamu: ***,gaara), namakaj ¶a nida i bar~…ĺi a kanatar~…ĺ, sakar~…ĺima a tumuk nu bar~…ĺi a kanatar~…ĺ; masawa ¶u nida i nijazuaj. sakas…ôpat a tumuk nu bar~…ĺi a nijazu Ē~ °, u ama ni wu-aj-r~…ĺow, ¶aaj kanamuńß tu sasabaaj a wawa nida. tusa a kikur~…ĺ nipi matatapi (r~…ĺińßun a kamu: ** ****) nunijazu Ē~ ° : kud…ôman masimaw a ninti ¶u : ¶aj katin…ôŇč matin…ôn…ôg: par~…ĺamar~…ĺ uzip: tusa a kikur~…ĺ, sumir~…ĺawaj a r~…ĺamar~…ĺ mukir~…ĺuj tu zip nida, tabakiaj a taŇčir~…ĺa, u takur~…ĺawaj a kur~…ĺit nu kawanan a mata, u sumir~…ĺawaj a kur~…ĺit nu kawir~…ĺiaj a mata. mańßida sar~…ĺusar~…ĺus ku Ňčip…ôn, mańßida sumir~…ĺawaj a r~…ĺikat maduduńß tu uzip nida. kina pat…ôt…ôk namakaj kuŇčku nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nu r~…ĺipun; u tusaaj a kikur~…ĺ a jawkuaj. u kuŇčku ni r~…ĺipun ńßananaj, anu maka r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶an ku nani Ē~ ° mar~…ĺajawkuaj tu, siatusa tu kikur~…ĺ . patapu ¶ a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč: tatusa a jutumu. tur~…ĺu a kikur~…ĺ sanpi isobu (r~…ĺińßun a kamu:*** *** ) nunijazu: masimaw a ninti ¶u: matin…ôn…ôg: uzip: patapu ¶ a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč: s…ôpat a kikur~…ĺ jonpi sankoku (r~…ĺińßun a kamu: *** *****) nunijazu: masimaw a ninti ¶u: matin…ôn…ôg: uzip: patapu ¶ a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč: r~…ĺima a kikur~…ĺ gopi kokuou (r~…ĺińßun a kamu: ** ****) nunijazu: masimaw a ninti ¶u: matin…ôn…ôg: uzip: patapu ¶ a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč: …ôn…ôm a kikur~…ĺ r~…ĺokupi sajk…ôn(r~…ĺińßun a kamu: *** ****) nunijazu: masimaw a ninti ¶u: matin…ôn…ôg: uzip: patapu ¶ a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč: pitu a kikur~…ĺ nanapi *om…ôi(r~…ĺińßun a kamu: *** ***** ) nunijazu: masimaw a ninti ¶u: matin…ôn…ôg: uzip: patapu ¶ a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč: war~…ĺu a kikur~…ĺ ńßa ¶ipi kiuki(r~…ĺińßun a kamu: *** **** ) nunijazu: masimaw a ninti ¶u: matin…ôn…ôg: uzip: patapu ¶ a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč: siwa a kikur~…ĺ giwpi kur~…ĺama(r~…ĺińßun a kamu: **** *** ) nunijazu: masimaw a ninti ¶u: matin…ôn…ôg: uzip: patapu ¶ a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč: ¶a ¶aj a bataan a kikur~…ĺ nunijazu: masimaw a ninti ¶u: matin…ôn…ôg: uzip: patapu ¶ a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč: mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkaaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan w…ôkipajk…ô-**** w…ôkipajk…ô- ,isbn ***-*-**-******-*,********* " ,isbn ***-***-***-***-*,********** "****"*****
S.FORM: izaw ku siwaay a kikul a yawkuay nu nikulitan, u Naluto bananas kya nikulitan. mahamin siwaay ku heni. u cay kalecad kya kikul atu caay kalecad a licelang ku heni. kakawaw nu kikul a yawkuay u kikul a yawkuay nu nikulitan ni Kisimoto Masasi(nipun a kamu: Ś≤łśú¨ śĖČŚŹ≤ÔľŹ„Āć„Āó„āā„Ā® „Āĺ„Āē„ĀóKishimoto Masashi) (1974ŚĻī11śúą8śó•Ôľć) pacunus ci nida tunu yawkuay nu lalangawan i kina patatakan. patetek cacay a kikul Icipi Siwkaku (Lihun a kamu: „ĀĄ„Ā°„Ā≥ „Āó„āÖ„Āč„ĀŹ) nuniyazu: limeken a likelikenan masimaw a ninticu: cay katineneg. matineneg: sibali uzip: izaw ku cacay a tabakiay a kikul nida, u kalakalawlaway kya uzip nida, izaw ku lu'timay a kulit muliyut i uzip nida. patapuc a icelang: wu-ay-low (Hulam a kamu: śąĎśĄõÁĺÖ, Lihun a kamu: „ā¨„āĘ„É©,Gaara), namakayca nida i bali a kanatal, sakalima a tumuk nu bali a kanatal; masawacu nida i niyazuay. sakasepat a tumuk nu bali a niyazu', u ama ni Wu-ay-low, caay kanamuh tu sasabaay a wawa nida. tusa a kikul Nipi Matatapi (Lihun a kamu: „Āę„Ā≥ „Āĺ„Āü„Āü„Ā≥) nuniyazu' : kudeman masimaw a ninticu : cay katineng matineneg: palamal uzip: tusa a kikul, sumilaway a lamal mukiluy tu zip nida, tabakiay a tangila, u takulaway a kulit nu kawanan a mata, u sumilaway a kulit nu kawiliay a mata. mahida salusalus ku ngipen, mahida sumilaway a likat maduduh tu uzip nida. kina patetek namakay kungku nu lalangawan nu lipun; u tusaay a kikul a yawkuay. u kungku ni lipun hananay, anu maka lasubu a mihcan ku nani' malayawkuay tu, siatusa tu kikul . patapuc a icelang: tatusa a Yutumu. tulu a kikul Sanpi Isobu (Lihun a kamu:„Āē„āď„Ā≥ „ĀĄ„ĀĚ„Ā∂ ) nuniyazu: masimaw a ninticu: matineneg: uzip: patapuc a icelang: sepat a kikul Yonpi Sankoku (Lihun a kamu: „āą„āď„Ā≥ „ĀĚ„āď„ĀĒ„ĀŹ„ĀÜ) nuniyazu: masimaw a ninticu: matineneg: uzip: patapuc a icelang: lima a kikul Gopi Kokuou (Lihun a kamu: „ĀĒ„Ā≥ „Āď„ĀŹ„Āä„ĀÜ) nuniyazu: masimaw a ninticu: matineneg: uzip: patapuc a icelang: enem a kikul Lokupi Sayken(Lihun a kamu: „āć„ĀŹ„Ā≥ „Āē„ĀĄ„ĀĎ„āď) nuniyazu: masimaw a ninticu: matineneg: uzip: patapuc a icelang: pitu a kikul Nanapi Jomei(Lihun a kamu: „Ā™„Ā™„Ā≥ „Ā°„āá„ĀÜ„āĀ„ĀĄ ) nuniyazu: masimaw a ninticu: matineneg: uzip: patapuc a icelang: walu a kikul Hacipi Kiuki(Lihun a kamu: „ĀĮ„Ā°„Ā≥ „Āé„āÖ„ĀÜ„Āć ) nuniyazu: masimaw a ninticu: matineneg: uzip: patapuc a icelang: siwa a kikul Giwpi Kulama(Lihun a kamu: „Āć„āÖ„ĀÜ„Ā≥ „āĮ„É©„Éě ) nuniyazu: masimaw a ninticu: matineneg: uzip: patapuc a icelang: cacay a bataan a kikul nuniyazu: masimaw a ninticu: matineneg: uzip: patapuc a icelang: malalitin tu ihekaay atu zumaay a natinengan weykipayke-ÁĀęŚĹĪŚŅćŤÄÖ weykipayke- ,ISBN 978-4-08-874247-2,2008ŚĻī9śúą9śó• " ,ISBN 978-986-382-631-6,2015ŚĻī2śúą10śó• "ÁĀęŚĹĪŚŅćŤÄÖ"śľęÁĒĽŚíĆŚä®ÁĒĽ
S.PHON: izaw ku siwaaj a kikur~…ĺ a jawkuaj nu nikur~…ĺitan, u nar~…ĺuto bananas kja nikur~…ĺitan. mańßamin siwaaj ku ńß…ôni. u ¶aj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad kja kikur~…ĺ atu ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a r~…ĺi ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ku ńß…ôni. kakawaw nu kikur~…ĺ a jawkuaj u kikur~…ĺ a jawkuaj nu nikur~…ĺitan ni kisimoto masasi(nipun a kamu: ** ******* ***kisńßimoto masasńßi) (***********) pa ¶unus ¶i nida tunu jawkuaj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan i kina patatakan. pat…ôt…ôk ¶a ¶aj a kikur~…ĺ i ¶ipi siwkaku (r~…ĺińßun a kamu: *** ****) nunijazu: r~…ĺim…ôk…ôn a r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺik…ônan masimaw a ninti ¶u: ¶aj katin…ôn…ôg. matin…ôn…ôg: sibar~…ĺi uzip: izaw ku ¶a ¶aj a tabakiaj a kikur~…ĺ nida, u kar~…ĺakar~…ĺawr~…ĺawaj kja uzip nida, izaw ku r~…ĺu Ē~ °timaj a kur~…ĺit mur~…ĺijut i uzip nida. patapu ¶ a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč: wu-aj-r~…ĺow (ńßur~…ĺam a kamu: ***, r~…ĺińßun a kamu: ***,gaara), namakaj ¶a nida i bar~…ĺi a kanatar~…ĺ, sakar~…ĺima a tumuk nu bar~…ĺi a kanatar~…ĺ; masawa ¶u nida i nijazuaj. sakas…ôpat a tumuk nu bar~…ĺi a nijazu Ē~ °, u ama ni wu-aj-r~…ĺow, ¶aaj kanamuńß tu sasabaaj a wawa nida. tusa a kikur~…ĺ nipi matatapi (r~…ĺińßun a kamu: ** ****) nunijazu Ē~ ° : kud…ôman masimaw a ninti ¶u : ¶aj katin…ôŇč matin…ôn…ôg: par~…ĺamar~…ĺ uzip: tusa a kikur~…ĺ, sumir~…ĺawaj a r~…ĺamar~…ĺ mukir~…ĺuj tu zip nida, tabakiaj a taŇčir~…ĺa, u takur~…ĺawaj a kur~…ĺit nu kawanan a mata, u sumir~…ĺawaj a kur~…ĺit nu kawir~…ĺiaj a mata. mańßida sar~…ĺusar~…ĺus ku Ňčip…ôn, mańßida sumir~…ĺawaj a r~…ĺikat maduduńß tu uzip nida. kina pat…ôt…ôk namakaj kuŇčku nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nu r~…ĺipun; u tusaaj a kikur~…ĺ a jawkuaj. u kuŇčku ni r~…ĺipun ńßananaj, anu maka r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶an ku nani Ē~ ° mar~…ĺajawkuaj tu, siatusa tu kikur~…ĺ . patapu ¶ a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč: tatusa a jutumu. tur~…ĺu a kikur~…ĺ sanpi isobu (r~…ĺińßun a kamu:*** *** ) nunijazu: masimaw a ninti ¶u: matin…ôn…ôg: uzip: patapu ¶ a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč: s…ôpat a kikur~…ĺ jonpi sankoku (r~…ĺińßun a kamu: *** *****) nunijazu: masimaw a ninti ¶u: matin…ôn…ôg: uzip: patapu ¶ a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč: r~…ĺima a kikur~…ĺ gopi kokuou (r~…ĺińßun a kamu: ** ****) nunijazu: masimaw a ninti ¶u: matin…ôn…ôg: uzip: patapu ¶ a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč: …ôn…ôm a kikur~…ĺ r~…ĺokupi sajk…ôn(r~…ĺińßun a kamu: *** ****) nunijazu: masimaw a ninti ¶u: matin…ôn…ôg: uzip: patapu ¶ a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč: pitu a kikur~…ĺ nanapi *om…ôi(r~…ĺińßun a kamu: *** ***** ) nunijazu: masimaw a ninti ¶u: matin…ôn…ôg: uzip: patapu ¶ a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč: war~…ĺu a kikur~…ĺ ńßa ¶ipi kiuki(r~…ĺińßun a kamu: *** **** ) nunijazu: masimaw a ninti ¶u: matin…ôn…ôg: uzip: patapu ¶ a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč: siwa a kikur~…ĺ giwpi kur~…ĺama(r~…ĺińßun a kamu: **** *** ) nunijazu: masimaw a ninti ¶u: matin…ôn…ôg: uzip: patapu ¶ a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč: ¶a ¶aj a bataan a kikur~…ĺ nunijazu: masimaw a ninti ¶u: matin…ôn…ôg: uzip: patapu ¶ a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč: mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkaaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan w…ôkipajk…ô-**** w…ôkipajk…ô- ,isbn ***-*-**-******-*,********* " ,isbn ***-***-***-***-*,********** "****"*****
